name: Apple Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs and vanilla extract to the mixture; whisk well to combine.
3. Gradually add baking soda, salt, flour, and cinnamon to the egg mixture, beating until just combined.
4. Mix in the thinly sliced apples and chopped walnuts until they are evenly distributed throughout the batter.
5. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan with butter or oil.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place it in a preheated oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
